inline_comments.message:
Why not use existing templates (common.fullname etc.)?
this comment is related all over the file.

One more thing

I'm missing something - is it HTTP (no S) only?
I am not sure there will be externalPort2 for every service. Would you like to consider changing this to "externalPort" instead?
why not just bring the annotations from values.yaml file similarly to tls definition below?
There may be some times when there are no annotations, in this case, let's leave the annotations section empty.
There is a tiny "tab" here. Better replace it with spaces I guess.
